summary.en: Jamaica references internationally recognised fire-safety benchmarks for BESS projects through BSJ and utility interconnection workflows, with NFPA 855 commonly used as the installation baseline. Building permit and installation approvals in projects linked to JPS/OUR processes require fire engineering evidence for spacing, suppression, detection, and ventilation in line with NFPA 855 principles.
summary.zh: 牙买加在BESS项目中通过BSJ和并网流程采用国际通行的消防基准，NFPA 855通常被作为安装参考。与JPS/OUR流程相关的建筑许可和安装审批要求提供符合NFPA 855要求的间距、抑制、探测与通风等火工工程证据。
summary.zht: 牙買加在BESS項目中通過BSJ和併網流程採用國際通行的消防基準，NFPA 855通常被作為安裝參考。與JPS/OUR流程相關的建築許可和安裝審批要求提供符合NFPA 855要求的間距、抑制、探測與通風等消防工程證據。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855:2023 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems)
NFPA 72:2022 (National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code)

summary.en: China uses GB 51048-2014 and GB 50016 as principal fire-protection design standards for batteries and electrical installations. Chinese documentation for BESS fire safety usually references GB/T 36276 and GB/T 36558 pathways. Those are not generally accepted in Jamaica where the project documents and fire review rely on NFPA 855 design logic for fixed energy storage installations.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 51048-2014和GB 50016作为电化学储能与电气装置防火设计的主要依据。中国BESS消防安全文件通常按照GB/T 36276与GB/T 36558路径编制，但在牙买加，项目文件和消防审查一般采用固定储能设备的NFPA 855设计逻辑，不通常直接接受对应替代。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 51048-2014和GB 50016作為電化學儲能與電氣裝置防火設計的主要依據。中國BESS消防安全文件通常按照GB/T 36276與GB/T 36558路徑編制，但在牙買加，項目文件和消防審查一般採用固定儲能設備的NFPA 855設計邏輯，不通常直接接受對應替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 51048-2014 (Code for fire protection design of electrochemical energy storage station)
GB 50016-2014 (Code for fire protection design of buildings)
GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: Chinese BESS fire safety documentation referencing only GB 51048 and GB 50016 does not meet the current Jamaica workflow expectation for NFPA 855-aligned installation compliance used in BSJ-oriented projects. Exporters must provide project-level installation design and evidence mapped to NFPA 855 provisions, including spacing and ventilation rationale and UL 9540A propagation support where required.
gap.zh: 仅基于GB 51048和GB 50016编制的中国BESS消防文件，通常不满足牙买加BSJ导向项目对NFPA 855一致安装合规的当前预期。出口商须提供按NFPA 855条款映射后的项目级安装设计和证据，包括间距、通风论证和必要时的UL 9540A蔓延试验支撑。
gap.zht: 僅基於GB 51048和GB 50016編制的中國BESS消防文件，通常不滿足牙買加BSJ導向項目對NFPA 855一致安裝合規的當前預期。出口商須提供按NFPA 855條款映射後的項目級安裝設計及證據，包括間距、通風論證及必要時的UL 9540A蔓延試驗支撐。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — building permit and installation approval prerequisite
mandatory_status.cn: GB 51048 / GB 50016 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to NFPA 855 for Jamaica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NFPA 855-aligned installation evidence — including spacing and fire-protection design mapped for BESS deployment context in Jamaica — is required for permit workflow with JPS- or OUR-linked project review. Chinese GB 51048/GB 50016 fire documentation is generally not accepted as a direct substitute. A qualified local fire engineer review is typically expected in practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在牙买加与JPS或OUR关联的项目审查中，需提供符合NFPA 855要求的安装证据，包括与当地BESS部署环境一致的间距及消防设计映射。中国GB 51048/GB 50016消防文件通常不被视为直接替代。通常还需要由持牌当地消防工程师进行复核。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在牙買加與JPS或OUR關聯的項目審查中，需提供符合NFPA 855要求的安裝證據，包括與當地BESS部署環境一致的間距及消防設計映射。中國GB 51048/GB 50016消防文件通常不被視為直接替代。通常還需要由持牌當地消防工程師進行復核。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal runaway propagation — UL 9540A test evidence

summary.en: When BESS modules are deployed near buildings or utility assets in Jamaica, operators and authorities commonly request thermal runaway propagation evidence used to justify separation logic. UL 9540A is the internationally used method under NFPA 855 for this purpose. For projects with JPS interface points, the same evidence is normally expected as part of project documentation.
summary.zh: 当BESS模组安装于靠近建筑物或公用设施处时，牙买加业主与相关机构通常要求热失控蔓延证据，用于支撑间距设计逻辑。UL 9540A是NFPA 855中通常使用的方法。涉及JPS接入点的项目，通常也在项目文件中要求提供该证据。
summary.zht: 當BESS模組安裝於靠近建築物或公用設施處時，牙買加業主與相關機構通常要求熱失控蔓延證據，用於支撐間距設計邏輯。UL 9540A是NFPA 855中通常使用的方法。涉及JPS接入點的項目，通常也在項目文件中要求提供該證據。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540A:2023 (Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems)
NFPA 855:2023 (Sections 4.3 and 5.3 — separation and spacing requirements)

summary.en: China generally applies GB 38031 and related thermal test clauses for traction and high-power battery technologies. Those procedures are not always structured to produce the same installation-separation output expected in a NFPA 855 review. Voluntary UL 9540A reports can exist for export markets, but this is not a universal GB requirement.
summary.zh: 中国通常对动力与高功率电池技术应用GB 38031及相关热测试条款。该类程序不总是按照NFPA 855审查所需的安装间距输出结果来组织。中国制造商可能会自愿取得UL 9540A报告用于出口市场，但这并非普遍的GB强制要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常對動力與高功率電池技術應用GB 38031及相關熱測試條款。該類程序不總是按照NFPA 855審查所需的安裝間距輸出結果來組織。中國製造商可能會自願取得UL 9540A報告用於出口市場，但這並非普遍的GB強制要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery)
GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: UL 9540A thermal runaway propagation report coverage for exact exported configuration is commonly required in Jamaica-linked project documentation. GB 38031 test results are often insufficient for the same purpose. Exporters should confirm whether any existing UL 9540A report covers cell format, module geometry, and enclosure configuration actually shipped to Jamaica.
gap.zh: 在牙买加相关项目文件中通常要求提供针对实际出口配置的UL 9540A热失控蔓延报告。GB 38031测试结果通常不足以满足该用途。出口商应确认是否已有UL 9540A报告覆盖了出口到牙买加的电芯规格、模组结构与外壳配置。
gap.zht: 在牙買加相關項目文件中通常要求提供針對實際出口配置的UL 9540A熱失控蔓延報告。GB 38031測試結果通常不足以滿足該用途。出口商應確認是否已有UL 9540A報告覆蓋出口到牙買加的電芯規格、模組結構與外殼配置。

mandatory_status.target: Usually mandatory for installation risk assessment where fire-separation justification is required
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for all GB product certifications; voluntarily obtained by some exporters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] If the BESS project in Jamaica requires thermal runaway propagation-based separation design, UL 9540A reports for the exact shipped product variant are required. If existing documentation was generated for a different cell or module configuration, a new report is typically required before permit approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若牙买加项目的安全评估依赖热失控蔓延间距设计，则需提供针对实际出口产品变型的UL 9540A报告。若现有文件是基于不同电芯或模组配置生成，则在审批前通常需要重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若牙買加項目的安全評估依賴熱失控蔓延間距設計，則需提供針對實際出口產品變型的UL 9540A報告。若現有文件是基於不同電芯或模組配置生成，則在審批前通常需要重新測試。
